title: leucas deflexa var. deflexa
intro: Leucas deflexa var. deflexa is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the 'Wild Camphor'. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Leucas deflexa var. deflexa include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of essential oils, extracts, and dried leaves for its herbal remedies.
